notes: Sources: official Allen & Heath SQ-5 Technical Datasheet PDF and ManualsLib SQ-5 Reference Manual (v1.5.0). The SQ-5 has no 5-pin DIN MIDI — MIDI is exclusively via USB-B and TCP/IP over the network port. The proprietary I/O Port option card slot (for Dante, Waves SoundGrid modules) is omitted as it has no matching standard connector type. ST1 and ST2 are each a pair of 1/4\" TRS jacks (L+R); listed individually here. The SQ-5 is a desktop surface mixer; it is not natively rack-mountable without an optional rack kit, so rackUnits is omitted.

ports.name: Mic/Line In 1–16
ports.note: Balanced XLR female, fully recallable digitally controlled preamp; 16 sockets

ports.name: ST1 In L
ports.note: Balanced 1/4" TRS stereo line input, left channel of ST1 pair

ports.name: ST1 In R
ports.note: Balanced 1/4" TRS stereo line input, right channel of ST1 pair

ports.name: ST2 In L
ports.note: Balanced 1/4" TRS stereo line input, left channel of ST2 pair

ports.name: ST2 In R
ports.note: Balanced 1/4" TRS stereo line input, right channel of ST2 pair

ports.name: ST3 In
ports.note: Unbalanced stereo 3.5mm mini jack; for background music source

ports.name: Line Out 1–12
ports.note: Balanced XLR male, 12 fully assignable line-level outputs

ports.name: Line Out 13
ports.note: Balanced 1/4" TRS jack, assignable line-level output

ports.name: Line Out 14
ports.note: Balanced 1/4" TRS jack, assignable line-level output

ports.name: AES Out
ports.note: Balanced XLR male, stereo AES3 digital output; 96kHz default, switchable to 44.1/48/88.2kHz

ports.name: Headphones
ports.note: 1/4" TRS jack on top surface with dedicated level control

ports.name: SLink
ports.note: Neutrik etherCON locking RJ45; digital multichannel audio expansion supporting dSnake (48kHz), DX and gigaACE (96kHz) protocols; up to 64x64 channels

ports.name: Network
ports.note: RJ45 Fast Ethernet (100 Mbit/s); TCP/IP control, MIDI over TCP/IP, wireless control via router

ports.name: USB Audio
ports.note: USB-B class-compliant audio/MIDI interface; 32x32 channels at 96kHz; also carries MIDI over USB; no 5-pin DIN MIDI ports on this mixer

ports.name: SQ-Drive
ports.note: USB-A on front panel; direct multitrack recording/playback to USB drive (16ch@96kHz or 32ch@48kHz)

ports.name: AC In
ports.note: IEC C14 mains inlet; 100–240V AC 50/60Hz; 75W consumption (SQ-5)
